prompt_template.system: You are a financial M&A deal-outcome classifier. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly one key: "label". The value must be either "rumour" or "complete". Do not include any extra text.
prompt_template.user:
Classify whether the following M&A item describes a completed deal or only a rumour.

Text: {{data.text}}

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON object with exactly one key 'label' and an allowed value.

components.name: correctness_reward
components.description: Predicted label matches the ground-truth deal outcome exactly.

publication.reason: This module is eval-only and uses the already-public FLARE benchmark wrapper; public redistribution claims for the full original Zephyr-derived corpus remain out of scope.
